videoSnippet.title: Every Game is A Thriller || Matthias Blübaum vs Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş || Biel Chess Festival 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Lotus July Arena https://lichess.org/tournament/UbnjUeLN
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments

Bluebaum, Matthias (2694) - Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2713)
Biel Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [06] 2026.07.14
D37 Queen's Gambit Declined, 4.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.Nf3 d5 4.Nc3 h6 5.Bf4 Bd6 6.Bxd6 Qxd6 7.e3 O-O 8.Rc1 b6 9.cxd5 Nxd5 10.Nxd5 exd5 11.Qc2 c6 12.Bd3 Bb7 13.O-O Nd7 14.Bf5 Rfe8 15.b4 Nf8 16.Ne5 g6 17.Bh3 Qxb4 18.Nxc6 Qd6 19.Ne5 Re7 20.f4 Rae8 21.Rf3 Ba6 22.Qd1 Bc4 23.Rg3 b5 24.Qh5 Qa3 25.Re1 Qc3 26.Qd1 Bxa2 27.f5 Bb3 28.Qe2 f6 29.Nxg6 Nxg6 30.Rf1 Rg7 31.Qh5 Bc4 32.Rxg6 Qxe3+ 33.Kh1 Bxf1 34.Rxg7+ Kxg7 35.Qg6+ Kf8 36.Qxf6+ Kg8 37.Qg6+ Kf8 38.Qf6+ Kg8 39.Qg6+ Kf8 40.Qf6+ Kg8
